src: A brown teddy bear with soft plush fur, left hand up, right hand on the leg. It has creamy round paws, a stitched smile, a blue ice pack on its head, and a patch on its chest reading "Get Well".
edit: A brown teddy bear as an anime character with bold lines. Left hand glows, right hand rests on its leg. It has creamy paws with glossy accents, a stitched smile, a blue ice pack, and an anime-styled "Get Well" patch.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: The object is on a large textured rock outdoors, surrounded by green foliage and a paved pathway, with another big rock in the back on the left, captured from a right side angle.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The object is on a smooth concrete surface beside a gently flowing river, with a grassy backdrop, viewed from a lower angle, highlighting the rippling water and scattered green leaves.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: The object sits on an asphalt road with worn markings, viewed from the front and slightly left. The road stretches behind with faint tire imprints and a slope to the right.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The object rests on vibrant green park grass, rotated slightly to the left, surrounded by lush grass blades with no obstruction.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: The object is against a brick wall on a concrete sidewalk, viewed straight on at eye level. The wall emphasizes the texture of the bricks and the smoothness of the concrete. A dry leaf is noticeable to the side.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: The object is atop a large textured rock, outdoors in anime style, surrounded by green foliage and a paved pathway, with another large rock in the left background. Viewed from the right angle, blending natural elements with anime flair.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The object is set on a styled concrete surface next to a shimmering river, viewed from a low angle. Neon green leaves scattered around in anime style, with exaggerated light reflecting off the water.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: An object rests on an anime-style asphalt road with vibrant worn markings, viewed from a front angle, slightly tilted left. The road stretches behind with faint tire imprints and a subtle slope to the right.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: An anime-inspired object sits in a park-like setting on vibrant, detailed green grass, slightly rotated to the left, with a clear view, capturing an animated landscape.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: An anime-style object against a detailed brick wall, with a smooth sidewalk below. To the side, a dry leaf with sharp strokes. The scene features bold colors and clean lines of anime settings.
